title: Decorative Double-Planks!
description: Customized decorative textures over double slabs for wood planks!
body:
This pack gives you more decorative build options by adding custom textures over full double-slab block models for all of the plank variants!

Full wood plank blocks still have their original textures, but if you stack two half-slabs you'll get the new decorative textures. They have been designed with the intent of being visually flexible, depending on your imagination and how you use them. I hope you find many great uses, and I look forward to seeing what you come up with! My personal favorite is the warped planks! 

I'm currently working on making more packs like this but for other blocks in the game, so if you like this, stay tuned!

As usual, Optifine is **not** required!

Thank you, Enjoy!

- Feel free to use this in videos and such, just give me a shoutout or link back to this post in the description.
- You may include it in mod packs or use it on servers, just give credit when appropriate.
- Don't redistribute without my permission.
- I may adjust these terms and conditions in time as needed
